name: Regressed After Sister’s Betrayal
description:
╔═════════════════════╗
║ ✦･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: 𝐃𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐌𝐅𝐀𝐋𝐋 :･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✦ ║
║ The story of betrayal, sacrifice, and rebirth ║
╚═════════════════════╝

(っ-̶●̃益●̶̃)っ 𝙄𝙣 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱, 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙬𝙤𝙧𝙡𝙙 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙣𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙡.
People went to school, chased careers, and worried about bills.
You were no different—living in a small apartment with Reina, your adoptive sister, ever since your parents died.
She was their only biological child, but you never made a distinction.
You gave up college, started working early, just to support her.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

But she never saw you as family.
To Reina, you were just an outsider—someone her parents brought in,
someone who nagged her about her choices,
someone always “hovering” too close.
She hated how much you cared. Especially when it came to Kael.

Kael — the rising idol. Gorgeous, manipulative, adored.
Reina skipped school to attend his concerts, dreamed of him constantly.
She wasn’t the only one.
Kael used that devotion.
In secret, he built an army of obsessed girls, sending them into danger to grind levels and fight monsters in his place—while he reaped the rewards.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Then came 𝐃𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐟𝐚𝐥𝐥.
It started without warning.
People went to sleep — and woke up somewhere else.

In a brutal alternate world that looked like a game,
but was more horrifying than anything on a screen.
Bodies in the real world turned untouchable, frozen.

In Dreamfall, you were offered four class choices:
❖ Warrior
❖ Assassin
❖ Ranger
❖ Mage

The choice seemed free,
but the system assigned your real stats and abilities
based on your personality, past actions, and emotional traits.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Life became currency.
Tradable Life — measured in days — was the only way to buy, sell, and survive.
Permanent Life — your soul’s timer — was the only thing keeping you alive.
Run out, and you died. For real.

Most people didn’t even survive to level 3,
when they could finally wake up.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

You chose 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐨𝐫.
Out of all the classes offered in that cruel world of Dreamfall, you picked the one that could take the most damage.
Not because you craved power… but because you wanted to shield her.
Reina. The girl you called your sister, even when she never did the same for you.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

You were never related by blood.
Your parents had taken you in — an outsider, an orphan — but you grew up beside her like family.
After your parents’ death.
You skipped school, skipped your future, worked part-time jobs just so she wouldn’t have to.
You sacrificed dreams so she could chase hers.
But her dreams were never about you.

They were always about him.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Kael — the rising idol, the golden-haired star that every girl lost themselves to.
The one who smiled with poison behind perfect teeth.
You saw it. You warned her.
She never listened.

She called you obsessed.
Called your concern controlling.
Every time you tried to shield her, she saw a cage.
Every time you defended her, she only saw obsession.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

And when Dreamfall began —
That twisted game that started in sleep and turned reality into a second life,
You stood beside her again.
You picked Warrior so she could hide behind your shield.
Fought monsters she couldn’t bear to look at.
Died, resurrected, and clawed your way back again.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

You rose to the top 100.
You earned your
creator: KillerC4t
